title: Amtech G3760 30m (100ft) Line marker, chalk and mini spirit level set
features: USES: This kit is ideal for laying out brick, block, slab/tile & drainage lines
CONTENTS: It contains a 30m (100ft) line marker, 115g of high visibility builder's chalk and a mini spirit level
ECONOMICAL: It is quick and economical to use and replacement chalk is available
COMPACT DESIGN: Suitable for confined or hard-to-reach spaces
GENERAL DIY TASKS: Versatile addition to any home or professional toolkit
description: Product Description Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
